title: Selection against light coats
short_desc: Predators catch light-coated fish against dark substrate. Dark allele should rise.

commentary.headline: Running: directional selection against light coats (N=200)
commentary.observe: The recessive dark allele 'b' should sweep the population. Watch the tank darken, and the BodyColor line on the chart drop from 0.5 toward 0 (that's the dominant light 'B' allele disappearing).
